column1: ご確認いただければと思います。
column2: ごかくにんいただければとおもいます。
column3: I would appreciate it if you could check on this.
column4: ～ばと思います (I would appreciate if you could ~, I hope you will ~)
column5: Verb[ば] + と思います / と思っております
column6: polite indirect request; the speaker expresses their wish as a personal hope rather than a direct command
column7: ばと思います: checking request softened as speaker's personal hope
column8: ばと思います = indirect polite wish-request; てください = polite direct request; ていただければ = if you could (more deferential); てほしい = want you to (direct desire)
column10: module:04-n2 jlpt:n2 point:～ばと思います source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:top10k complexity:standard
